languages.text: "Будьте крайне осторожны". {n}Дознаватель говорит над вашим ухом, практически не размыкая губ.{/n} "Для того, кто борется с ересью, эта дама проявляет слишком высокий уровень моральной гибкости".

"Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."
languages.original_text: "Будьте крайне осторожны". {n}Дознаватель говорит над вашим ухом, практически не размыкая губ.{/n} "Для того, кто борется с ересью, эта дама проявляет слишком высокий уровень моральной гибкости".

traits.locale_text: "Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

"Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

"Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

languages.text: «Extreme la precaución». {n}El interrogador habla junto a tu oído, casi sin separar los labios.{/n} «Para estar librando una guerra contra la herejía, esta señorita ha demostrado una flexibilidad moral desmesurada».
languages.original_text: "Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

traits.locale_text: «Extreme la precaución». {n}El interrogador habla junto a tu oído, casi sin separar los labios.{/n} «Para estar librando una guerra contra la herejía, esta señorita ha demostrado una flexibilidad moral desmesurada».

languages.text: “务必小心。”{n}审讯官在你耳边低声，几乎未启唇。{/n}“对于一个正与异端作战的人来说，这位女士的道德灵活性未免太高了点。”
languages.original_text: "Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

traits.locale_text: “务必小心。”{n}审讯官在你耳边低声，几乎未启唇。{/n}“对于一个正与异端作战的人来说，这位女士的道德灵活性未免太高了点。”

languages.text: « Soyez extrêmement {mf|prudent|prudente}. » {n}L'interrogateur vous parle au creux de l'oreille, entrouvrant à peine les lèvres.{/n} « Pour quelqu'un qui prétend livrer une guerre contre l'hérésie, cette femme fait preuve d'une souplesse morale plus qu'excessive. »
languages.original_text: "Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

traits.locale_text: « Soyez extrêmement {mf|prudent|prudente}. » {n}L'interrogateur vous parle au creux de l'oreille, entrouvrant à peine les lèvres.{/n} « Pour quelqu'un qui prétend livrer une guerre contre l'hérésie, cette femme fait preuve d'une souplesse morale plus qu'excessive. »

languages.text: "Son derece dikkatli olun." {n}Sorgucu, neredeyse dudaklarını oynatmadan kulağınızın dibinde konuşuyor.{/n} "Kâfirliğe karşı savaş yürüten biri için bu hanımefendi, fazlasıyla yüksek düzeyde bir ahlaki esneklik gösteriyor."
languages.original_text: "Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

traits.locale_text: "Son derece dikkatli olun." {n}Sorgucu, neredeyse dudaklarını oynatmadan kulağınızın dibinde konuşuyor.{/n} "Kâfirliğe karşı savaş yürüten biri için bu hanımefendi, fazlasıyla yüksek düzeyde bir ahlaki esneklik gösteriyor."

languages.text: "Seid äußerst vorsichtig." {n}Der Interrogator spricht in dein Ohr, ohne die Lippen zu bewegen.{/n} "Für jemanden, der einen Krieg gegen die Ketzerei führt, ist diese Dame in moralischer Hinsicht ausgesprochen flexibel."
languages.original_text: "Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

traits.locale_text: "Seid äußerst vorsichtig." {n}Der Interrogator spricht in dein Ohr, ohne die Lippen zu bewegen.{/n} "Für jemanden, der einen Krieg gegen die Ketzerei führt, ist diese Dame in moralischer Hinsicht ausgesprochen flexibel."

languages.text: 「極めて注意深く。」{n}尋問官は耳元で、ほとんど唇を動かさずに言った。{/n}「異端に対する戦争を繰り広げる者としては、この女性は過度に高い道徳的柔軟性を示している。」
languages.original_text: "Be extremely careful." {n}The Interrogator speaks near your ear, almost without parting his lips.{/n} "For someone waging a war against heresy, this lady has shown an overly high degree of moral flexibility."

traits.locale_text: 「極めて注意深く。」{n}尋問官は耳元で、ほとんど唇を動かさずに言った。{/n}「異端に対する戦争を繰り広げる者としては、この女性は過度に高い道徳的柔軟性を示している。」
